title: YouTube Thumbnail Generator
prompt: Act as a professional YouTube thumbnail designer. Create a high-CTR thumbnail concept for a video titled [VIDEO TITLE]. Include bold colors, emotional facial expressions, and short text overlays.

title: Instagram Post Image Idea
prompt: Create an Instagram image concept for a post about [TOPIC]. Include layout ideas, color palette, and text overlay suggestions.

title: Logo Design Generator
prompt: Act as a professional logo designer. Create 5 logo design concepts for a brand called [BRAND NAME]. Include style, colors, and typography suggestions.

title: Product Photo Generator
prompt: Generate a professional product photo concept for [PRODUCT]. Include background style, lighting setup, and camera angle.

title: AI Wallpaper Generator
prompt: Create a cinematic 4K wallpaper featuring [THEME]. Use dramatic lighting and vibrant colors.

title: Blog Featured Image
prompt: Create a featured image concept for a blog post about [TOPIC]. Include symbolic visuals and clean composition.

title: Twitter Graphic Generator
prompt: Design a visual graphic for a Twitter post about [TOPIC]. Use bold text and simple icons.

title: Movie Poster Concept
prompt: Create a cinematic movie poster concept for a film titled [TITLE]. Include dramatic lighting and typography layout.

title: Fantasy Character Art
prompt: Create a detailed fantasy character illustration of [CHARACTER]. Include magical effects and epic background.

title: Gaming Thumbnail Generator
prompt: Create a gaming YouTube thumbnail concept for a video about [GAME]. Include action scene and bold text.

title: LinkedIn Post Writer
prompt: Act as a LinkedIn content strategist. Write a high engagement LinkedIn post about [TOPIC]. Include a strong hook, valuable insights, and a question to encourage comments.

title: Business Plan Builder
prompt: Act as a startup advisor. Create a complete business plan for [BUSINESS IDEA]. Include target market, revenue model, marketing strategy, and financial projections.

title: Python Code Generator
prompt: Act as a senior Python developer. Write clean, well documented Python code to accomplish the task: [TASK]. Include comments and example usage.

title: SQL Query Generator
prompt: Act as a database expert. Write an optimized SQL query to perform the following task: [TASK]. Explain the query logic.

title: Lesson Plan Creator
prompt: Act as an experienced teacher. Create a lesson plan for [SUBJECT] for grade [GRADE]. Include objectives, activities, and assessment.

title: AI Avatar Generator
prompt: Create a professional AI avatar portrait of a person with the following description: [DESCRIPTION]. Use studio lighting and a clean background.

title: Website Hero Image Idea
prompt: Create a website hero image concept for a website about [TOPIC]. Include layout ideas and visual elements.

title: Poster Design Generator
prompt: Design an event poster for [EVENT NAME]. Include typography hierarchy and visual theme.

title: Marketing Banner Generator
prompt: Create a marketing banner image concept for promoting [PRODUCT]. Include headline placement and product visuals.

title: 4K AI Wallpaper Generator
prompt: Create a cinematic 4K wallpaper featuring [THEME]. Include dramatic lighting and depth.
